headline: 把 GitHub 上分散的 AI 开源信号整理成一份适合每天快速浏览的精选清单。
summary: 系统会优先选择最近仍在活跃推进、定位清晰、不是资源集合类噪音仓库的 AI 开源项目，并提供中文摘要、标签和推荐理由。

projects.name: headroom
projects.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
projects.summaryZh: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。

projects.name: hermes-webui
projects.description: Hermes WebUI: The best way to use Hermes Agent from the web or from your phone!
projects.summaryZh: Hermes WebUI: The best way to use Hermes Agent from the web or from your phone! 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。

projects.name: edgequake
projects.description: EdegQuake 🌋 High-performance GraphRAG inspired from LightRag written in Rust; Transform documents into intelligent knowledge graphs for superior retrieval and generation
projects.summaryZh: EdegQuake 🌋 High-performance GraphRAG inspired from LightRag written in Rust; Transform documents into intelligent knowledge graphs for superior retrieval and generation 它更偏数据接入和知识增强，适合做企业检索、问答和私有数据助手。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做知识库问答、企业搜索和私有数据助手的产品团队。

projects.name: sglang
projects.description: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.
projects.summaryZh: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models. 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。

projects.name: FastDeploy
projects.description: High-performance Inference and Deployment Toolkit for LLMs and VLMs based on PaddlePaddle
projects.summaryZh: High-performance Inference and Deployment Toolkit for LLMs and VLMs based on PaddlePaddle 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。

projects.name: seatunnel
projects.description: SeaTunnel is a multimodal, high-performance, distributed, massive data integration tool.
projects.summaryZh: SeaTunnel is a multimodal, high-performance, distributed, massive data integration tool. 它更偏数据接入和知识增强，适合做企业检索、问答和私有数据助手。

projects.name: LMCache
projects.description: LMCache: Supercharge Your LLM with the Fastest KV Cache Layer
projects.summaryZh: LMCache: Supercharge Your LLM with the Fastest KV Cache Layer 它更偏底层推理和服务基础设施，适合关注性能、成本和部署效率。

projects.name: inference
projects.description: Swap GPT for any LLM by changing a single line of code. Xinference lets you run open-source, speech, and multimodal models on cloud, on-prem, or your laptop — all through one unified, production-ready inference API.
projects.summaryZh: Swap GPT for any LLM by changing a single line of code. Xinference lets you run open-source, speech, and multimodal models on cloud, on-prem, or your laptop — all through one unified, production-ready inference API. 它主要面向代码场景，适合做 AI 编程助手、代码生成或自动修复。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做 AI Coding、代码审核、开发提效产品的团队。
